CHEUNG--MANAGER. DEFENDANT WAS ASSISTED BY MANDARIN INTERPRETER---IRENE LAM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-25-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHEN, BICHING RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CBS BUILDING SUPPLY, INC. DBA.  CBS GLASS & WINDOWS $445.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $490.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
